name: Recommendations Fallback
body: [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You can configure recommendation fallbacks to help ensure valuable page real estate is never wasted when there's insufficient data to populate your primary widget choice. "}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "This helps maintain consistent product visibility and conversion opportunities, particularly for new visitors or products without browsing history data."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Setting up fallback mechanisms enables you to be more strategic with your primary recommendation filtering\u2014targeting specific customer segments without worrying about leaving empty spaces on your pages. When your first-choice widget can't populate due to limited data, the fallback automatically displays alternative relevant products, which helps optimize the shopping experience for all visitors regardless of their browsing history."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "What is a Recommendations Fallback Mechanism?"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Our Recommendations solution includes a number of widgets, including \u2018Hot Sellers\u2019, \u2018Recently Viewed Items\u2019, \u2018Newest Products\u2019, \u2018Frequently Purchased Together\u2019, \u2018Customers Who Viewed This Also Viewed\u2019, and \u2018Customers Who Viewed This Ultimately Bought\u2019."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "children": [{"text": ""}], "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/3KUC19B51R89/5cc0ab3-club-l-london-recos.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/3KUC19B51R89/5cc0ab3-club-l-london-recos.png", "name": "5cc0ab3-Club_L_London_Recos_.png", "type": "image/png", "size": 1869113, "width": 1895, "height": 766, "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "downloadUrl": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/api/v2/media/download-by-url?url=https%3A%2F%2Fus.v-cdn.net%2F6038474%2Fuploads%2F3KUC19B51R89%2F5cc0ab3-club-l-london-recos.png", "mediaID": 1001, "dateInserted": "2025-10-06T17:26:17+00:00", "insertUserID": 1178, "foreignType": "embed", "foreignID": "1178", "embedType": "image"}}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Our recommendations in action for Club L London", "italic": true}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "All of these can be separated into two main groups - those that require user data to populate, and those that do not."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "As an example, let\u2019s look at the Recently Viewed Items widget. This widget requires user data to populate. It retains information about the current and previous sessions of the individual user, and populates the section with items that that specific shopper has already viewed."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "But what happens if there is no data for the widget to draw upon? Perhaps it is the shopper\u2019s very first time on the site, and hasn\u2019t yet viewed any items. Or perhaps the product itself is new, meaning there\u2019s no data to populate the Users Who Viewed This Ultimately Bought widget."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "In these scenarios, it is important that there is a fallback mechanism in place, so that the space occupied by the widget does not lay idle, potentially representing a missed selling opportunity."}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Detailed Filtering Within Recommendations"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "In addition, this capability also enables an extremely important use case where the merchant can choose to be extremely detailed with their widget filtering parameters - targeting widgets at their preferred shoppers without worrying about causing the widget not to populate by being too specific."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "How to Set a Recommendation Fallback"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "Go to the Merchant Dashboard and navigate to Recommendations"}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "Start to create a new Recommendations widget as normal.\u00a0"}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/517-integrating-recommendations-in-shopify", "target": "_blank", "children": [{"text": "Read our Recommendations explainer page for help with this."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "With some widgets, you will see the option (between the 'Recommendation Notes' and the 'Filtering rules' sections) to set 'Recommendations Fallback'."}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "Here you will see a drop down menu and you will be able to select from widgets you have already created. The selected widget will appear in the area specified in the event that your first choice of widget does not have enough data to populate."}]}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "children": [{"text": ""}], "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/UEXSVYUWA2OG/cf6ebff-recommendations-fallback.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/UEXSVYUWA2OG/cf6ebff-recommendations-fallback.png", "name": "cf6ebff-Recommendations_Fallback.png", "type": "image/png", "size": 65213, "width": 1901, "height": 964, "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "downloadUrl": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/api/v2/media/download-by-url?url=https%3A%2F%2Fus.v-cdn.net%2F6038474%2Fuploads%2FUEXSVYUWA2OG%2Fcf6ebff-recommendations-fallback.png", "mediaID": 1002, "dateInserted": "2025-10-06T17:26:35+00:00", "insertUserID": 1178, "foreignType": "embed", "foreignID": "1178", "embedType": "image"}}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "\n\n"}]}]
